paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.11, with a change of 0.99% from the prior close and a change of -31.88% over the last 20 trading sessions.

Recent news headlines include discussions of the company's CEO departure, a director's exit over governance concerns, and the completion of a $375 million convertible notes offering. The news sources include Stocktwits, simplywall.st, and Yahoo Finance, with the most recent headlines dated July 18, 2026.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K form filed on July 15, 2026, regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another 8-K form filed on July 13, 2026, disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson due to a disagreement over access to company books and records. There has been one Form 4 filing and no Form 144 filings.
